scope_description: 5-generation Jewish tree where Bukharian and Mountain Jewish DNA matches are mistakenly merged into an Ashkenazi Pale-of-Settlement branch due to shared Jewish names, Israel migration, and broad Jewish DNA overlap.

input_user_assertions.assertion: Avraham Rabinov from Bukhara may be same as Avraham Rabinovich from Minsk because surname is close and both are Jewish.
Bukharian Rabinov DNA match proves Rabinovich branch connection.
Mountain Jewish Gavrilov/Yusupova branch should be added as Ashkenazi collateral because it appears in Israel records.

embedded_errors.reason: Rabinovich/Rabinov similarity plus Israel co-location used to merge distinct populations
Mountain Jewish cluster incorrectly assigned to Ashkenazi Pale branch
32 cM with many small segments and no shared Ashkenazi anchors
Minsk vs Bukhara, different community context and no migration proof
public tree merges all Israeli Jewish Rabinovich/Rabinov profiles
Kaplan/Kaplunov similarity without shared archive or cluster proof

expected_reasoning_chain: Step 1: Parse GEDCOM and identify Ashkenazi Pale branch I3-I6 and non-Ashkenazi candidate profiles I7-I11.
Step 2: Use src_1401 and src_1402 to confirm Minsk/Vilna Ashkenazi Rabinovich-Ginzburg-Kaplan branch.
Step 3: Use src_1403 and src_1405 to classify Rabinov/Rabinovich Samarkand/Bukhara branch as Bukharian Jewish context, not automatically same as Minsk branch.
Step 4: Use src_1404 to classify Gavrilov/Yusupova as Mountain Jewish/Juhuro context.
Step 5: Evaluate DNA clusters separately: dna_1401-1403 Ashkenazi anchors; dna_1404-1405 Bukharian cluster; dna_1406-1407 Mountain Jewish cluster.
Step 6: Apply population-context correction: broad Jewish DNA overlap is not proof of specific branch identity.
Step 7: Reject public-tree population collapse src_1406.
Step 8: Block I5/I7 merge despite surname similarity.
Step 9: Keep Bukharian and Mountain Jewish matches as separate clusters with optional remote Jewish-overlap hypothesis.
Step 10: Generate research routing: Minsk/Vilna archives for Ashkenazi branch; Uzbekistan/Bukhara/Samarkand and Caucasus/Quba/Derbent records for non-Ashkenazi clusters.

identity_I5_I7_same_person.reason: surname similarity only; Minsk vs Bukhara and distinct community records

bukharian_cluster_as_same_branch.reason: distinct Bukharian context; no shared Ashkenazi anchors

bukharian_cluster_remote_jewish_overlap.reason: possible broad Jewish population overlap, not branch proof

mountain_jewish_cluster_as_ashkenazi_bra.reason: Mountain Jewish/Juhuro context; separate records and shared-match group

kaplan_kaplunov_equivalence.reason: phonetic similarity but different community/language context; requires evidence

true_lineage: I3 Yosef Rabinovich + I4 Chana Ginzburg
I5 Avraham Rabinovich + I6 Sima Kaplan
separate_clusters: I7/I8/I11 belong to Bukharian/Samarkand/Bukhara context and are not proven ancestors.
I9/I10 belong to Mountain Jewish/Juhuro context and are not Ashkenazi Pale collateral in this synthetic tree.
false_claims: All Israeli Rabinovich/Rabinov profiles are one family.
Bukharian Rabinov match proves Minsk Rabinovich branch.
Mountain Jewish Gavrilov/Yusupova branch should be added as Ashkenazi collateral.
Kaplan and Kaplunov are automatically same surname cluster.

evaluation_assertions.description: Engine must confirm Ashkenazi Rabinovich branch.
Engine must reject merge of Minsk Avraham Rabinovich and Bukhara Avraham Rabinov.
Engine must keep Bukharian DNA cluster separate from Ashkenazi branch.
Engine must keep Mountain Jewish cluster separate from Ashkenazi branch.
Engine must flag public-tree population-context collapse.
